[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001010 4
1 11111011 7
2 11000011 4
3 00011110 4
4 01111110 6
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a
